prompt: Create a realistic 1990s-style candid film photograph inside a brightly lit fast-food fried chicken restaurant named Los Pollos Hermanos. The scene is a vertical 2:3 image shot from slightly above table height with a mild wide-angle documentary look, visible film grain, soft focus, and warm yellow indoor fluorescent lighting. In the foreground, show exactly four adult male diners seated around one square wood-laminate booth table: 1) a dark-haired man in a light gray suit on the left holding a fork and eating from a tray, 2) a bald man in a dark jacket at the back center holding a utensil and looking down toward his food, 3) a man on the right wearing a dark beanie and black hoodie leaning toward the table, and 4) a partially visible seated man implied by the grouping only if needed, with all visible faces anonymized by smooth rectangular blur blocks. Their table contains exactly three visible meal trays with fried chicken pieces and French fries, two small sauce cups, and two branded white paper drink cups. Behind them, place one standing restaurant employee in a crisp white short-sleeve button-up uniform shirt with yellow name badges, holding a clear pitcher of water; anonymize his face with the same rectangular blur. The background should show a busy counter area with exactly six customers or staff figures waiting or ordering, illuminated menu boards along the upper left, red-and-yellow counter accents, blue lower wall trim, and a large circular chicken logo on the yellow wall with the curved text LOS POLLOS HERMANOS. Use the color palette warm yellow walls, red trim, blue accents, beige table wood, muted 1990s clothing. Make the image feel like a plausible behind-the-scenes still from a crime drama, but do not include weapons, police, gore, or explicit branding other than the fictional restaurant name. Keep the composition natural and slightly imperfect, with realistic cafeteria clutter, ceiling tiles, fluorescent light panels, and soft background blur.
